title: Pseudo-code function block renderer with references and calls
purpose: Displays parsed pseudo-code functions with syntax highlighting, export badges, and navigable references and calls sections.
module_context: Exports a PseudoBlock component that renders function blocks with keyword highlighting, export indicators, and lazy-loaded reference information.

steps.content: Split the input text into segments based on keyword patterns.
For each keyword match, wrap it in a bold element.
Return an array of text and bold elements representing the formatted line.

methods.name: renderStep
methods.normalized_params: (step: { content: string; depth: number }, index: number): JSX.Element

steps.content: Trim the content of the step to remove leading/trailing whitespace.
IF the trimmed content is empty, return a zero-height div.
Extract the first word of the content to determine test identifier.
IF the first word is IF or ELSE, apply a test identifier to the content.
Format the content with keyword highlighting and indentation.
Return a styled div element with bullet point and indented content.
Initialize state for tracking reference visibility and loading status.
Define a callback function to toggle reference visibility and load references when first opened.
Render the function header with keyword, name, parameters, and return type.
Display export badge if the function is exported.
Render a button to toggle the reference section with loading indicator.
IF the reference section is open, render the used by references with lazy loading.
Render the calls section if the function has any calls.
Display the function body with indented steps and keyword highlighting.
IF references are not open and no references are loaded, begin loading references.
Load references from the API using project, function name, and current file stem.
IF loading succeeds, store the loaded references.
IF loading fails, set references to an empty array.
Set loading state to false after loading completes.
Toggle the visibility state of the references section.
